narrative:
Dunham East (precinct in Washington County) has 998 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points.
